message:
style(tests): normalize method chain formatting in integration tests

Formatting cleanup in test files:

cli_integration.rs:
- Break long fluent assertion chain in decode_with_no_strict test
  across multiple lines for better readability

edge_cases.rs:
- Expand from_f64(f64::NEG_INFINITY) call to multi-line format

No behavioral changes - rustfmt normalization only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
